label: Luma AI
description: Generate videos with Dream Machine and 3D assets with Genie using Luma AI's generative media API.

form.title: Connect Luma AI
form.subtitle: Paste your Luma AI API key to start generating videos and 3D assets.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your Luma AI API key from the Dream Machine dashboard. Quickest setup — no OAuth or extra configuration needed.
methods.how_to:
## Get your Luma AI API key

1. Sign in at [lumalabs.ai](https://lumalabs.ai).
2. Go to **Dream Machine** from the top navigation.
3. Open **Settings** (gear icon, bottom-left) → **API**.
4. Click **Generate API Key** (or copy an existing one).
5. Copy the key and paste it into the **API Key** field below.

## Notes

- The key grants access to both Dream Machine (video) and Genie (3D) generation endpoints.
- Keys are tied to your account's credit balance — monitor usage in the same **API** settings panel.
- If you rotate or regenerate the key, update it here to avoid auth errors.
- Keep the key secret; anyone with it can consume your Luma credits.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found at lumalabs.ai → Dream Machine → Settings → API. Grants access to video and 3D generation.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: API Base URL
fields.description: Override only if you're using a custom or regional Luma AI endpoint. Leave as default in most cases.
